title: FOLLOW CALLIE ON INSTAGRAM
text: FOLLOW CALLIE ON INSTAGRAM The best way to keep up to date with all of my upcoming releases and some other VERY exciting secret projects I’m currently working on is to follow me on Instagram! Instagram is fast becoming my favorite way to communicate with the outside world, and I’d love to hear from you over there. I do answer my direct messages (though it might take me some time) plus I frequently post pics of my mini Dachshund, Cooper, so it’s basically a win/win. You can find me right here! Alternatively, you can find me via me handle @calliehartauthor within the app. I look forward to hanging out with you!
